snippets.comment: The best teacher I had. Very understanding and genuinely wanted to help her students learn. Very educational class, and the workload was just right. She was my favorite teacher last semester. I also found myself not feeling any sense of dread or anxiety when emailing her about a question. Best teach

She is one of the best teachers i've ever had. She is truley passionate for her love of writing and teaching. She sees the potential in every student and genuinely cares for and loves us. She does not give a lot of homework, but we do many group discussions which I enjoy. She touches on many persona

The best profesor I have had so far. She sees the humans that sit in front of her and has sympathy for everyone, very caring and uplifting. Her lectures all tight together for a bigger picture. Had so much fun writing and doing the research for her class, and this is coming from someone who did not
